description: Rearchitect the slide deck builder AI from a single monolithic agent into a coordinated team: Orchestrator (Sonnet, streams to user), Design Agent (Opus/Sonnet, writes HTML), Research Agent (Haiku, web search), QA Agent (Sonnet, evaluates with fresh eyes). Max 2 QA retries. Parallel execution. Frontend unchanged.

userStories.title: Agent types and interfaces
userStories.description: As a developer, I need type definitions for the multi-agent system.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/deck-builder/agents/types.ts
Export AgentRole = 'orchestrator' | 'design' | 'research' | 'qa'
Export DesignBrief interface: slideIndex (number), currentSlideData (SlideData), instruction (string), complexity ('simple' | 'complex'), useAnimations (boolean), mediaContext (string)
Export ResearchBrief interface: question (string), maxWords (number, default 200)
Export QAVerdict interface: pass (boolean), score (number 1-10), issues (string[]), fixes (string[])
Export AgentResult interface: role (AgentRole), result (string), slidesUpdated (SlideData[] | null), verdict (QAVerdict | null), html (string | null)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read src/types/deck-builder.ts for SlideData type. Foundation for all other stories. Use general-purpose agent.

userStories.title: Orchestrator system prompt
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a lean system prompt for the Lead Agent focused on delegation.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/deck-builder/agents/orchestrator-prompt.ts
Export getOrchestratorPrompt(context: { name, description, slideCount }) returning string
Prompt includes: Claru positioning (3 sentences max), delegation rules, response guidelines
Delegation rules: handle directly (title/body edits, reorder, delete) vs delegate_design (custom HTML, visual work) vs delegate_research (web search, data lookup)
Prompt under 800 words total
Does NOT include: design reference, GSAP, spatial guide, media inventory
Includes: 'Report results in max 10 words after delegation completes'
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read src/lib/deck-builder/gtm-prompts.ts for current prompt. Extract only orchestration parts. Use general-purpose agent.

userStories.title: Design Agent system prompt
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a focused prompt for the Design Agent with all design knowledge.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/deck-builder/agents/design-prompt.ts
Export getDesignAgentPrompt(brief: DesignBrief) returning string
Includes full slide design reference from slide-design-reference.ts
Includes Claru visual identity (bg #0a0908, accent #92B090, fonts Geist Sans + JetBrains Mono)
Conditionally includes GSAP reference when brief.useAnimations is true
Includes the brief: slide index, current slide data, instruction, media context
Instructs: return ONLY HTML string, no explanations, no markdown wrapping
Instructs: 'HTML is a 100vw x 100vh canvas. Include background, grid overlay, typography.'
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read slide-design-reference.ts and gsap-reference.ts. This prompt is the richest — all design knowledge lives here. Use general-purpose agent.

userStories.title: Research Agent and QA Agent system prompts
userStories.description: As a developer, I need prompts for the Research and QA Agents.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/deck-builder/agents/research-prompt.ts with getResearchAgentPrompt(question, maxWords)
Research prompt: search + synthesize + return brief under maxWords, structured markdown, no design knowledge
Create src/lib/deck-builder/agents/qa-prompt.ts with getQAAgentPrompt()
QA prompt: includes full design reference + 3-dimension quality framework (Layout, Content, Interactions) + spatial guide
QA output format: JSON { pass: boolean, score: number, issues: string[], fixes: string[] }
QA scoring: 7+ passes. Agent instructed to be critical — 'senior McKinsey designer reviewing work'
QA does NOT include: GTM strategy, media inventory, conversation history
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read slide-design-reference.ts for QA content. Read analyzeSlideLayout in server-tool-handlers.ts for the 3-dimension framework. Use general-purpose agent.

userStories.title: Agent executor — Design Agent caller
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a function that calls the Design Agent and returns HTML.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/deck-builder/agents/executor.ts
Export callDesignAgent(brief: DesignBrief, slides: SlideData[]): Promise<{ html: string, selfNote: string }>
Uses claude-opus-4-6 when brief.complexity === 'complex', claude-sonnet-4-20250514 otherwise
System prompt from getDesignAgentPrompt(brief), user message is brief.instruction + current slide JSON
Max tokens: 8192
Parses HTML from response — strips markdown code fences if Claude wraps it
Returns { html, selfNote } — selfNote is first line of non-HTML text or empty
Error: returns { html: '', selfNote: 'Design agent failed: ...' }
Fresh call every time — no conversation history
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read src/lib/deck-builder/ai-agent.ts for getAnthropicClient. Design Agent does NOT use tool_use — just returns HTML as text. Use general-purpose agent.

userStories.title: Agent executor — Research Agent caller
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a function that calls the Research Agent with tools.
acceptanceCriteria: Add callResearchAgent to src/lib/deck-builder/agents/executor.ts
Export callResearchAgent(question: string, maxWords?: number, supabase?: SupabaseClient): Promise<string>
Uses claude-haiku-4-5-20251001
HAS tool_use tools: web_search (calls webSearch from web-search.ts) and get_data_catalog (queries Supabase if client provided)
Implements multi-turn tool loop: call Claude → if tool_use, execute tool, send result back → repeat until end_turn
Max tokens: 2048
Returns final text response after all tool calls
Error: returns 'Research failed: ...'
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read the tool loop pattern in chat/route.ts (the while(continueConversation) loop). Replicate it here non-streaming. Import webSearch from web-search.ts. Use general-purpose agent.

userStories.title: Agent executor — QA Agent caller
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a function that calls the QA Agent and returns a verdict.
acceptanceCriteria: Add callQAAgent to src/lib/deck-builder/agents/executor.ts
Export callQAAgent(html: string, screenshot: string | null, layoutAnalysis: string): Promise<QAVerdict>
Uses claude-sonnet-4-20250514
User message: text (HTML + layout analysis) + image (screenshot as base64 if available)
Uses Anthropic multimodal content: [{type:'text',...}, {type:'image',source:{type:'base64',media_type:'image/png',data:...}}]
Max tokens: 2048
Parses JSON verdict from response — strips markdown fences if wrapped
Parse failure: returns { pass: false, score: 0, issues: ['Failed to parse QA response'], fixes: [] }
Error: returns { pass: false, score: 0, issues: ['QA agent failed'], fixes: [] }
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: QA Agent has NO tools — just receives data and returns JSON. Use multimodal content format for screenshots. Use general-purpose agent.

userStories.title: Orchestrator tool definitions
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the tool set for the orchestrator with delegation tools.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/lib/deck-builder/agents/orchestrator-tools.ts

Export ORCHESTRATOR_TOOLS as Anthropic.Tool[] containing: edit_slide, add_slide, delete_slide, reorder_slides, restructure_deck, undo_slide, get_all_slides, get_slide_html, set_template_theme, customize_theme, apply_to_all_slides, generate_section, get_media_assets (copy definitions from ai-tools.ts)
Add delegate_design: params { slide_index, instruction, complexity ('simple'|'complex'), use_animations (boolean) }
Add delegate_research: params { question, max_words? }
Add delegate_qa: params { slide_index }
Add generate_variations: params { slide_index, direction? }
Export processOrchestratorTool(toolName, input, slides, mediaAssets?) that handles direct tools (reuse handlers from ai-tools.ts)
Delegation tools (delegate_*, generate_variations) return { updatedSlides: slides, result: '__NEEDS_DELEGATION__' }
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Read src/lib/deck-builder/ai-tools.ts for existing tool definitions and handlers. Copy the ones the orchestrator keeps. Import and reuse the handler functions. Use general-purpose agent.

userStories.title: Refactor chat route — multi-agent orchestration
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to refactor the chat route to use the orchestrator + specialist team.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify src/app/api/admin/deck-builder/[id]/chat/route.ts
Replace SLIDE_TOOLS with ORCHESTRATOR_TOOLS from orchestrator-tools.ts
Replace getSystemPrompt with getOrchestratorPrompt from orchestrator-prompt.ts
Replace processToolCall with processOrchestratorTool for direct tools

When result is '__NEEDS_DELEGATION__', handle delegation: delegate_design triggers Design Agent → QA loop, delegate_research triggers Research Agent, delegate_qa triggers QA Agent, generate_variations triggers 3x Design Agent calls

delegate_design flow: emit status 'Designing slide N...', build DesignBrief, callDesignAgent, apply HTML, capture screenshot + analyzeSlideLayout, callQAAgent, if fail and retries<2 retry with QA feedback, emit tool_result with verdict summary
delegate_research flow: emit status 'Researching...', callResearchAgent, return brief to orchestrator
Orchestrator tool results are summaries not raw HTML — e.g. 'Slide 5 redesigned. QA: PASS (8/10)'
Undo manager still works, chat history still persisted, streaming still works
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: This is the biggest story. Read the current chat route thoroughly. Core loop structure stays the same — the change is delegation tools trigger specialist calls instead of processToolCall. Specialist calls are non-streaming. Use general-purpose agent.

userStories.title: Status events and QA verdict in ChatPanel
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see agent team activity and QA verdicts in the chat.
acceptanceCriteria: Add { type: 'status', message: string } to stream event type in ChatPanel
Handle 'status' in stream switch: render as inline indicator (font-mono text-xs text-[var(--accent-primary)] animate-pulse)
Status appears at bottom of message list, auto-dismisses on next event
Add QA verdict rendering: when tool_result for delegate_design includes verdict data, show compact card with score badge (green pass / orange fail) and issues
Parse verdict from tool result text (look for 'QA: PASS' or 'QA: FAIL' pattern, or structured JSON)
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Read ChatPanel.tsx stream event handling. Add new event types. Status should feel like a progress indicator not a chat message. Use frontend-expert agent.

userStories.title: Playwright E2E test — multi-agent flow
userStories.description: As QA, I need an end-to-end test verifying the multi-agent design and QA flow.
acceptanceCriteria: Create tests/e2e/deck-builder-multi-agent.spec.ts
Test requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (skip if not set)
Test: navigate to template editor, send 'redesign slide 1', verify status messages appear, verify QA verdict appears, verify slide changed, verify preview updates
Timeout: 90 seconds
Uses Playwright MCP
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Dev server at http://localhost:3005. Admin credentials in env vars. Use webapp-testing skill with Playwright MCP.
